1→# AgentPress v1 — Atomic Requirements
     2→
     3→**Generated**: 2026-05-03
     4→**Source PRD**: `/home/agent/shipyard-ai/prds/prd-agentpress-2026-05-03.md`
     5→**Source Decisions**: `/home/agent/shipyard-ai/rounds/prd-agentpress-2026-05-03/decisions.md`
     6→**Status**: Locked for Build Phase
     7→
     8→> **Important:** `decisions.md` OVERRIDES the PRD where they conflict. The locked decisions (e.g., SEOMeta killed, manual runner killed, standard key storage, two agents only) are the binding spec.
     9→
    10→---
    11→
    12→## Plugin Bootstrap & Structure
    13→
    14→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
    15→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
    16→| R-001 | Plugin main file bootstrap | PRD §5.1, Decisions File Structure | `agentpress.php` exists with valid WP header, namespace `AgentPress`, activates without errors |
    17→| R-002 | Activation — Capability CPT | PRD §5.1, Decision 7 | CPT `agentpress_capability` registered with `public => false`, `show_ui => false`, `supports => []` |
    18→| R-003 | Activation — Log CPT | PRD §5.1, Decision 7 | CPT `agentpress_log` registered with `public => false`, `show_ui => false`, no revisions, no autosave |
    19→| R-004 | File structure compliance | Decisions File Structure | All locked files exist; no extra files created. Third agent file is placeholder only |
    20→
    21→---
    22→
    23→## REST API Endpoint
    24→
    25→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
    26→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
    27→| R-005 | REST namespace | PRD §5.1, §6 | `agentpress/v1` registered; 404 on unregistered routes |
    28→| R-006 | Single endpoint | PRD §5.3, Decision 5 | `POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run` accepts POST only; no other endpoints in v1 |
    29→| R-007 | Auth — Nonce | PRD §5.3 | `X-WP-Nonce` from logged-in users accepted; invalid returns 401 |
    30→| R-008 | Auth — Application Passwords | PRD §5.3 | Basic Auth with Application Password accepted; invalid returns 401 |
    31→| R-009 | Authorization | PRD §5.3 | Requires `manage_options` or custom `agentpress_run` capability; 403 without |
    32→| R-010 | Request validation | PRD §5.3, §6 | Missing `task` returns 400 `agentpress_missing_task`; optional `context` defaults to `{}` |
    33→| R-011 | Success response shape | PRD §5.3, §6 | JSON contains `success` (bool), `routing` (object with `capability`, `reasoning`), `result` (object), `latency_ms` (int) |
    34→| R-012 | Error response shape | PRD §6 | 400/500 errors include `code`, `message`, `data.status`; 500 includes `data.capability` |
    35→| R-013 | Synchronous only | PRD §3, Decision 11 | Endpoint blocks until complete; no streaming; 30s timeout |
    36→
    37→---
    38→
    39→## Router & Routing Logic
    40→
    41→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
    42→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
    43→| R-014 | Local PHP keyword map | Decision 2 | `str_contains` matching routes built-in agents without LLM call |
    44→| R-015 | Claude fallback | Decision 2 | Claude called ONLY when local map misses; fallback latency 4–8s acceptable |
    45→| R-016 | Keyword whitelist locked | Decisions Open Q #2 | Content keywords (`write`, `content`, `blog`, `post`, `article`, `text`) → `content_writer`; image keywords (`image`, `picture`, `photo`, `graphic`) → `image_generator` |
    46→| R-017 | System prompt construction | PRD §5.3 | Prompt includes capability manifest; instructs Claude to return ONLY JSON (no markdown); specifies schema `{"capability":"...","reasoning":"...","payload":{...}}` |
    47→| R-018 | No third-party routing | Decision 8 | Router handles only built-in agents; no external capability calls in v1 |
    48→
    49→---
    50→
    51→## JSON Parser Hardening (Non-Negotiable)
    52→
    53→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
    54→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
    55→| R-019 | Markdown fence stripping | Decision 12 | ` ```json...``` ` responses parsed correctly; fences removed before decode |
    56→| R-020 | Truncated response handling | Decision 12 | Partial JSON does not fatal-error; returns structured parser error |
    57→| R-021 | Hallucinated slug handling | Decision 12 | Unknown slugs return error (not crash); fallback to `capability: none` |
    58→| R-022 | Schema validation | Decisions Open Q #7 | Required field `capability` validated; missing/invalid fields rejected with error |
    59→| R-023 | Parser budget honored | Decision 12 | Dedicated `class-parser.php` exists; tested with markdown fences, truncated JSON, hallucinated keys before any other feature |
    60→
    61→---
    62→
    63→## Built-In Agents
    64→
    65→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
    66→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
    67→| R-024 | ContentWriter registration | PRD §5.4, Decision 4 | Slug `content_writer`; callable via router; in capability list |
    68→| R-025 | ContentWriter input schema | PRD §5.4 | Accepts `topic` (string), `tone` (enum: friendly/professional/witty), `length` (enum: short/medium/long); invalid values return error |
    69→| R-026 | ContentWriter Claude integration | PRD §5.4 | Calls Anthropic Messages API via `wp_remote_post` with configured key; handles API errors gracefully |
    70→| R-027 | ContentWriter guardrail | PRD §5.4 | Output truncated to 2048 chars max; `tokens_used` still reported |
    71→| R-028 | ContentWriter output shape | PRD §5.4 | Returns `{"text":"...","tokens_used":42}` |
    72→| R-029 | ImageGenerator registration | PRD §5.4, Decision 4 | Slug `image_generator`; callable via router; in capability list |
    73→| R-030 | ImageGenerator input schema | PRD §5.4 | Accepts `prompt` (string), `size` (enum: 512x512/1024x1024); invalid values return error |
    74→| R-031 | ImageGenerator CF Workers integration | PRD §5.4 | Calls configured `cf_worker_url` via `wp_remote_post`; handles Worker errors gracefully |
    75→| R-032 | ImageGenerator HTTPS guardrail | PRD §5.4 | Returned URL must be HTTPS; HTTP rejected |
    76→| R-033 | ImageGenerator output shape | PRD §5.4 | Returns `{"url":"https://...","format":"webp","size":"1024x1024"}` |
    77→| R-034 | ImageGenerator error shape | PRD §5.4 | Failed Worker call returns structured WP_Error-style error with original message |
    78→| R-035 | SEOMeta excluded | Decision 4 | No `seo_meta` capability, no `class-seo-meta.php`, no references in code |
    79→| R-036 | Third agent placeholder | Decision 4, File Structure | File `includes/agents/class-agent-third.php` exists as minimal stub; not registered |
    80→
    81→---
    82→
    83→## Capability Registry
    84→
    85→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
    86→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
    87→| R-037 | CPT-based storage | PRD §5.2, Decision 7 | `agentpress_capability` CPT stores `_agentpress_name`, `_agentpress_description`, `_agentpress_input_schema`, `_agentpress_handler` as post_meta; `post_name` = slug |
    88→| R-038 | Built-in auto-registration | PRD §5.2, Decision 4 | ContentWriter and ImageGenerator inserted into CPT on activation; immediately queryable |
    89→| R-039 | No third-party API | Decision 8 | `agentpress_register_capability()` function does NOT exist in v1; no external registration mechanism |
    90→
    91→---
    92→
    93→## Activity Logging
    94→
    95→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
    96→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
    97→| R-040 | Log every task | PRD §5.3, Decision 7 | Log entry created on every task completion (success or error); `post_title` = truncated task string |
    98→| R-041 | Log meta fields | PRD §5.3, §7, Decisions Open Q #4 | Meta: `_agentpress_capability`, `_agentpress_payload`, `_agentpress_result`, `_agentpress_latency_ms`, `_agentpress_status` (`success` or `error`); timestamp = `post_date` |
    99→| R-042 | Auto-prune | PRD §7, Decisions Open Q #4 | On insert, if count > 500, delete oldest 50; pruning non-blocking; count never exceeds 550 |
   100→| R-043 | Log viewer | PRD §5.5, Decision 7 | Admin displays last 50 logs with time, capability, status pill (green/red), latency |
   101→
   102→---
   103→
   104→## Admin Dashboard
   105→
   106→| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
   107→|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
   108→| R-044 | Single screen, no tabs | Decision 3, Decision 5 | Page slug `tools-agentpress` under Tools menu; no tab navigation; no wizards |
   109→| R-045 | No manual task runner | Decision 5 | No textarea + Run button; testing via cURL/Postman only |
   110→| R-046 | Claude API key field | PRD §5.5, Decision 6 | Text input (type="password"), saved to `agentpress_settings`; supports `AGENTPRESS_CLAUDE_KEY` constant override |
   111→| R-047 | Cloudflare Worker URL field | PRD §5.5 | Text input for Worker URL, saved to `agentpress_settings`; URL format validation |
   112→| R-048 | Default model select | PRD §5.5 | Dropdown with `claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022` as default; saved to `agentpress_settings` |
   113→| R-049 | Standard key storage | Decision 6 | Plain option storage; no `wp_hash`/`base64_encode`; `wp-config.php` constants take precedence; UI disabled when constant is defined |
   114→| R-050 | Native WordPress styling | PRD §5.5, §8, Decision 3 | Uses `.wp-list-table`, `.form-table`; no CSS frameworks; custom CSS minimal (spacing/typography only); WP admin colors |
   115→| R-051 | Activity log display | PRD §5.5 | Table shows timestamp, capability, status pill, latency; most recent first |
   116→| R-052 | No front-end chat | Decision 9 | No shortcode, no public UI; REST API only interface |
   117→| R-053 | No onboarding wizard | PRD §8, Decision 5 | Single admin screen; setup in README only |
   118→
   119→---
   120→
   121→## Settings & Storage

# AgentPress v1 — Atomic Requirements

**Generated**: 2026-05-03
**Source PRD**: `/home/agent/shipyard-ai/prds/prd-agentpress-2026-05-03.md`
**Source Decisions**: `/home/agent/shipyard-ai/rounds/prd-agentpress-2026-05-03/decisions.md`
**Status**: Locked for Build Phase

> **Important:** `decisions.md` OVERRIDES the PRD where they conflict. The locked decisions (e.g., SEOMeta killed, manual runner killed, standard key storage, two agents only) are the binding spec.

---

## Plugin Bootstrap & Structure

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-001 | Plugin main file bootstrap | PRD §5.1, Decisions File Structure | `agentpress.php` exists with valid WP header, namespace `AgentPress`, activates without errors |
| R-002 | Activation — Capability CPT | PRD §5.1, Decision 7 | CPT `agentpress_capability` registered with `public => false`, `show_ui => false`, `supports => []` |
| R-003 | Activation — Log CPT | PRD §5.1, Decision 7 | CPT `agentpress_log` registered with `public => false`, `show_ui => false`, no revisions, no autosave |
| R-004 | File structure compliance | Decisions File Structure | All locked files exist; no extra files created. Third agent file is placeholder only |

---

## REST API Endpoint

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-005 | REST namespace | PRD §5.1, §6 | `agentpress/v1` registered; 404 on unregistered routes |
| R-006 | Single endpoint | PRD §5.3, Decision 5 | `POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run` accepts POST only; no other endpoints in v1 |
| R-007 | Auth — Nonce | PRD §5.3 | `X-WP-Nonce` from logged-in users accepted; invalid returns 401 |
| R-008 | Auth — Application Passwords | PRD §5.3 | Basic Auth with Application Password accepted; invalid returns 401 |
| R-009 | Authorization | PRD §5.3 | Requires `manage_options` or custom `agentpress_run` capability; 403 without |
| R-010 | Request validation | PRD §5.3, §6 | Missing `task` returns 400 `agentpress_missing_task`; optional `context` defaults to `{}` |
| R-011 | Success response shape | PRD §5.3, §6 | JSON contains `success` (bool), `routing` (object with `capability`, `reasoning`), `result` (object), `latency_ms` (int) |
| R-012 | Error response shape | PRD §6 | 400/500 errors include `code`, `message`, `data.status`; 500 includes `data.capability` |
| R-013 | Synchronous only | PRD §3, Decision 11 | Endpoint blocks until complete; no streaming; 30s timeout |

---

## Router & Routing Logic

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-014 | Local PHP keyword map | Decision 2 | `str_contains` matching routes built-in agents without LLM call |
| R-015 | Claude fallback | Decision 2 | Claude called ONLY when local map misses; fallback latency 4–8s acceptable |
| R-016 | Keyword whitelist locked | Decisions Open Q #2 | Content keywords (`write`, `content`, `blog`, `post`, `article`, `text`) → `content_writer`; image keywords (`image`, `picture`, `photo`, `graphic`) → `image_generator` |
| R-017 | System prompt construction | PRD §5.3 | Prompt includes capability manifest; instructs Claude to return ONLY JSON (no markdown); specifies schema `{"capability":"...","reasoning":"...","payload":{...}}` |
| R-018 | No third-party routing | Decision 8 | Router handles only built-in agents; no external capability calls in v1 |

---

## JSON Parser Hardening (Non-Negotiable)

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-019 | Markdown fence stripping | Decision 12 | ` ```json...``` ` responses parsed correctly; fences removed before decode |
| R-020 | Truncated response handling | Decision 12 | Partial JSON does not fatal-error; returns structured parser error |
| R-021 | Hallucinated slug handling | Decision 12 | Unknown slugs return error (not crash); fallback to `capability: none` |
| R-022 | Schema validation | Decisions Open Q #7 | Required field `capability` validated; missing/invalid fields rejected with error |
| R-023 | Parser budget honored | Decision 12 | Dedicated `class-parser.php` exists; tested with markdown fences, truncated JSON, hallucinated keys before any other feature |

---

## Built-In Agents

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-024 | ContentWriter registration | PRD §5.4, Decision 4 | Slug `content_writer`; callable via router; in capability list |
| R-025 | ContentWriter input schema | PRD §5.4 | Accepts `topic` (string), `tone` (enum: friendly/professional/witty), `length` (enum: short/medium/long); invalid values return error |
| R-026 | ContentWriter Claude integration | PRD §5.4 | Calls Anthropic Messages API via `wp_remote_post` with configured key; handles API errors gracefully |
| R-027 | ContentWriter guardrail | PRD §5.4 | Output truncated to 2048 chars max; `tokens_used` still reported |
| R-028 | ContentWriter output shape | PRD §5.4 | Returns `{"text":"...","tokens_used":42}` |
| R-029 | ImageGenerator registration | PRD §5.4, Decision 4 | Slug `image_generator`; callable via router; in capability list |
| R-030 | ImageGenerator input schema | PRD §5.4 | Accepts `prompt` (string), `size` (enum: 512x512/1024x1024); invalid values return error |
| R-031 | ImageGenerator CF Workers integration | PRD §5.4 | Calls configured `cf_worker_url` via `wp_remote_post`; handles Worker errors gracefully |
| R-032 | ImageGenerator HTTPS guardrail | PRD §5.4 | Returned URL must be HTTPS; HTTP rejected |
| R-033 | ImageGenerator output shape | PRD §5.4 | Returns `{"url":"https://...","format":"webp","size":"1024x1024"}` |
| R-034 | ImageGenerator error shape | PRD §5.4 | Failed Worker call returns structured WP_Error-style error with original message |
| R-035 | SEOMeta excluded | Decision 4 | No `seo_meta` capability, no `class-seo-meta.php`, no references in code |
| R-036 | Third agent placeholder | Decision 4, File Structure | File `includes/agents/class-agent-third.php` exists as minimal stub; not registered |

---

## Capability Registry

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-037 | CPT-based storage | PRD §5.2, Decision 7 | `agentpress_capability` CPT stores `_agentpress_name`, `_agentpress_description`, `_agentpress_input_schema`, `_agentpress_handler` as post_meta; `post_name` = slug |
| R-038 | Built-in auto-registration | PRD §5.2, Decision 4 | ContentWriter and ImageGenerator inserted into CPT on activation; immediately queryable |
| R-039 | No third-party API | Decision 8 | `agentpress_register_capability()` function does NOT exist in v1; no external registration mechanism |

---

## Activity Logging

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-040 | Log every task | PRD §5.3, Decision 7 | Log entry created on every task completion (success or error); `post_title` = truncated task string |
| R-041 | Log meta fields | PRD §5.3, §7, Decisions Open Q #4 | Meta: `_agentpress_capability`, `_agentpress_payload`, `_agentpress_result`, `_agentpress_latency_ms`, `_agentpress_status` (`success` or `error`); timestamp = `post_date` |
| R-042 | Auto-prune | PRD §7, Decisions Open Q #4 | On insert, if count > 500, delete oldest 50; pruning non-blocking; count never exceeds 550 |
| R-043 | Log viewer | PRD §5.5, Decision 7 | Admin displays last 50 logs with time, capability, status pill (green/red), latency |

---

## Admin Dashboard

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-044 | Single screen, no tabs | Decision 3, Decision 5 | Page slug `tools-agentpress` under Tools menu; no tab navigation; no wizards |
| R-045 | No manual task runner | Decision 5 | No textarea + Run button; testing via cURL/Postman only |
| R-046 | Claude API key field | PRD §5.5, Decision 6 | Text input (type="password"), saved to `agentpress_settings`; supports `AGENTPRESS_CLAUDE_KEY` constant override |
| R-047 | Cloudflare Worker URL field | PRD §5.5 | Text input for Worker URL, saved to `agentpress_settings`; URL format validation |
| R-048 | Default model select | PRD §5.5 | Dropdown with `claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022` as default; saved to `agentpress_settings` |
| R-049 | Standard key storage | Decision 6 | Plain option storage; no `wp_hash`/`base64_encode`; `wp-config.php` constants take precedence; UI disabled when constant is defined |
| R-050 | Native WordPress styling | PRD §5.5, §8, Decision 3 | Uses `.wp-list-table`, `.form-table`; no CSS frameworks; custom CSS minimal (spacing/typography only); WP admin colors |
| R-051 | Activity log display | PRD §5.5 | Table shows timestamp, capability, status pill, latency; most recent first |
| R-052 | No front-end chat | Decision 9 | No shortcode, no public UI; REST API only interface |
| R-053 | No onboarding wizard | PRD §8, Decision 5 | Single admin screen; setup in README only |

---

## Settings & Storage

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-054 | Settings option structure | PRD §7 | Option key `agentpress_settings`; serialized array with `claude_api_key`, `cf_worker_url`, `default_model`, `installed_version` |
| R-055 | No encrypted storage | Decision 6 | No encryption/decryption functions; keys readable as plain text in DB |
| R-056 | wp-config constant support | Decision 6 | Constants `AGENTPRESS_CLAUDE_KEY`, `AGENTPRESS_CF_WORKER_URL`, `AGENTPRESS_DEFAULT_MODEL` checked before option values; UI fields disabled when constants defined |

---

## Distribution & Documentation

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-057 | readme.txt | PRD §9, Decision 10 | WP.org header format; ~3 paragraphs; tags: `ai`, `agents`, `automation`, `claude`, `orchestration`; API usage disclosed |
| R-058 | README API example | PRD §9 | cURL example for `POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run`; installation steps |
| R-059 | No billing/SaaS mentions | Decision 8 | No "Pro", "Premium", "tier" references; no monetization mentions |
| R-060 | No third-party registration docs | Decision 8 | README does not document `agentpress_register_capability()`; v2 only |

---

## Non-Functional & Exclusions

| ID | Requirement | Source | Acceptance Criteria |
|----|-------------|--------|---------------------|
| R-061 | No async queues | Decision 11 | No WP-Cron task processing; no queue library; all tasks synchronous |
| R-062 | No BYOK | Decision 11 | Single site-level key; no per-user keys; BYOK noted as v2 trigger |
| R-063 | 30-second timeout | PRD §14 | `wp_remote_post` timeout = 30s; timeout returns structured error |
| R-064 | Latency target | PRD §13 | Average `latency_ms` < 4000 for built-in agents (measured over 100+ tasks) |
| R-065 | Zero fatal errors | PRD §13 | No fatal PHP errors after 100 tasks; all errors handled gracefully |
| R-066-R-075 | Exclusions verified | Decisions 4–9, 11 | SEOMeta dead, manual runner dead, no dev API, no streaming, no async, no BYOK, no front-end chat, no onboarding, no encrypted storage, third agent placeholder only |

---

## Requirements Summary

| Category | Count |
|----------|-------|
| Plugin Bootstrap | 4 |
| REST API | 9 |
| Router | 5 |
| Parser | 5 |
| Built-In Agents | 13 |
| Capability Registry | 3 |
| Activity Logging | 4 |
| Admin Dashboard | 10 |
| Settings & Storage | 3 |
| Distribution | 4 |
| Non-Functional | 15 |
| **Total** | **71** |

content.thinking:

# AgentPress v1 — Specification

**PRD Source**: `github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-90.md` (AgentForge dream candidate)
**Plan Source**: `.planning/phase-1-plan.md` (AgentPress v1 WordPress Plugin)
**Decisions Source**: `rounds/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-90/decisions.md` (Forge decisions)

> **Note**: This spec follows the Phase 1 Plan for AgentPress v1 — a WordPress plugin that implements the AgentForge vision of multi-agent AI orchestration. The plugin is the v1 manifestation of the AgentForge dream.

---

## Goals (from PRD)

1. **Build a visual builder for multi-agent AI workflows** — Non-developers can design, test, and deploy multi-agent AI workflows
2. **First-mover advantage in visual agent building** — Think Zapier, but for orchestrating Claude agents
3. **Enable agent orchestration as the next automation wave** — Users can chain multiple AI agents together
4. **Freemium model ready** — Free for 3 workflows, then pricing tiers (v2)
5. **Target users**: Operations teams, no-code builders, consultants

---

## Implementation Approach (from Plan)

The v1 implementation is a **WordPress plugin** called AgentPress that provides:

### Architecture Summary

```
agentpress/
├── agentpress.php              # Main plugin file, activation hooks, autoloader
├── includes/
│   ├── class-parser.php        # JSON extraction & validation (hardened)
│   ├── class-agents.php        # Capability registry (CPT-based)
│   ├── class-logger.php        # Activity logging with auto-prune
│   ├── class-router.php        # Keyword map + Claude fallback
│   ├── class-rest-api.php      # Single REST endpoint
│   ├── class-admin.php         # Admin UI (single screen)
│   └── agents/
│       ├── class-content-writer.php   # Built-in agent: text generation
│       ├── class-image-generator.php  # Built-in agent: image generation
│       └── class-agent-third.php      # Placeholder stub (v2)
├── admin/
│   ├── css/agentpress-admin.css       # Minimal native WP styling
│   └── views/settings.php             # Settings form (if separated)
└── readme.txt                  # WordPress.org distribution
```

### Execution Flow

1. **Request**: `POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run` with `{task, context}`
2. **Route**: Router tries local PHP keyword map first, then Claude fallback
3. **Execute**: Agents registry calls internal handler (ContentWriter or ImageGenerator)
4. **Log**: Logger writes CPT entry with latency, status, payload, result
5. **Respond**: Standardized JSON response with routing, result, latency

### Wave Sequencing

| Wave | Tasks | Theme |
|------|-------|-------|
| 1 | 1, 2, 3 | Foundation (bootstrap, parser, CSS) |
| 2 | 4, 5, 6, 7 | Core Classes (agents, logger, built-ins) |
| 3 | 8 | Orchestration (router) |
| 4 | 9 | Integration (REST API) |
| 5 | 10, 11 | Admin & Polish (UI, readme, audit) |

---

## Verification Criteria

### Wave 1 — Foundation

#### Task 1: Plugin Bootstrap + CPT Registration
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| Plugin activates without fatal errors | Check `wp-content/debug.log` after activation |
| CPT `agentpress_capability` exists | `SELECT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = 'agentpress_capability'` returns rows |
| CPT `agentpress_log` exists | `SELECT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = 'agentpress_log'` returns rows |
| `agentpress_settings` option created | Query `wp_options` for `option_name = 'agentpress_settings'` |
| Built-in capabilities inserted | Query returns `content_writer` and `image_generator` posts |
| `agentpress_get_setting()` helper works | Call function, verify wp-config constant fallback |

#### Task 2: JSON Parser Hardening
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| Test harness exists at `tests/parser-test.php` | File exists and is executable |
| All 10+ test cases pass | Run test harness, verify all cases return expected results |
| Markdown fence stripping works | Input: `` ```json{"capability":"x"}``` `` → Output: parsed array |
| Truncated JSON returns WP_Error | Input: `{"capability":` → Output: WP_Error with `agentpress_parser_error` |
| Hallucinated slug rejected | Input: `{"capability":"seo_meta"}` → Output: WP_Error invalid capability |

#### Task 3: Admin CSS
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| File exists at `admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` | File exists |
| File under 100 lines | `wc -l admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns ≤ 100 |
| File under 3KB | `stat -f%z` or `wc -c` returns ≤ 3072 bytes |
| All selectors prefixed `.agentpress-` | `grep -v '^\.' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` shows no unprefixed selectors |
| No `!important` declarations | `grep -i '!important' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing |
| No Tailwind/Bootstrap classes | `grep -E '(tw-|btn-|container)' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing |

---

### Wave 2 — Core Classes

#### Task 4: Agents Base Class + Capability Registry
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| `Agents::get_capabilities()` returns 2 capabilities | Call method, verify array has `content_writer` and `image_generator` |
| `Agents::build_manifest()` returns serializable array | `json_encode(Agents::build_manifest())` succeeds |
| No `agentpress_register_capability()` function exists | `grep -r 'function agentpress_register_capability' includes/` returns nothing |

#### Task 5: Activity Logger
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| `Logger::log()` creates CPT entry | Call method, verify row in `wp_posts` with `post_type = 'agentpress_log'` |
| Auto-prune works at 500+ entries | Insert 505 entries, verify oldest 50 deleted, count ≤ 550 |
| No revisions for log posts | Query `wp_posts` for `post_type = 'revision'` with `post_parent` in log IDs returns nothing |

#### Task 6: ContentWriter Agent
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| `Content_Writer::run()` validates input | Call with invalid `tone`, verify WP_Error returned |
| Claude API called with correct headers | Mock test verifies `x-api-key`, `anthropic-version` headers |
| Output truncated to 2048 chars | Mock long response, verify `strlen(result['text'])` ≤ 2048 |
| `agentpress_run_content_writer()` handler registered | Function exists and is callable |

#### Task 7: ImageGenerator Agent
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| `Image_Generator::run()` validates input | Call with invalid `size`, verify WP_Error returned |
| HTTPS guardrail works | Mock HTTP URL response, verify WP_Error rejected |
| Timeout handled gracefully | Mock timeout, verify WP_Error with user-friendly message |
| `agentpress_run_image_generator()` handler registered | Function exists and is callable |

---

### Wave 3 — Orchestration

#### Task 8: Router — Keyword Map + Claude Fallback
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| Local routing works for content keywords | `Router::route('write a blog post')` returns `source=local`, `capability=content_writer` |
| Local routing works for image keywords | `Router::route('generate an image')` returns `source=local`, `capability=image_generator` |
| Claude fallback called on ambiguous input | `Router::route('something vague')` with valid API key returns `source=claude` |
| Local routing does NOT call Claude API | Monitor HTTP requests during local route, verify zero Anthropic calls |

---

### Wave 4 — Integration

#### Task 9: REST API Endpoint
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| Unauthenticated request returns 401/403 | `curl POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run` without auth |
| Missing `task` returns 400 `agentpress_missing_task` | `curl -d '{}' /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run` with auth |
| ContentWriter task returns 200 with `result.text` | `curl -d '{"task":"write about AI"}'` with valid API key |
| ImageGenerator task returns 200 with `result.url` | `curl -d '{"task":"make an image"}'` with valid Worker URL |
| Log entries created in CPT | Query `agentpress_log` after requests, verify entries exist |
| Ambiguous task with invalid key returns 500 | Verify structured error, not PHP fatal |

---

### Wave 5 — Admin & Polish

#### Task 10: Admin UI
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| Page appears under Tools menu | Navigate to wp-admin → Tools → AgentPress |
| No tabs on admin page | Visual inspection, no tab navigation HTML |
| No manual task runner textarea | Search page HTML for `<textarea>`, verify none for task input |
| Settings persist after save | Enter API key, save, reload, verify value persists |
| wp-config constant disables field | Define `AGENTPRESS_CLAUDE_KEY`, verify field disabled with note |
| Log table displays after REST tasks | Run tasks via cURL, verify log rows appear with status pills |

#### Task 11: Readme + Integration + Exclusion Audit
| Check | Verification Method |
|-------|---------------------|
| `readme.txt` has valid WP.org header | Header contains `=== AgentPress ===`, contributors, tags, requires |
| Exclusion audit passes | Search codebase for excluded features (see below) |
| Smoke test completes | Activate, run ContentWriter task, run ImageGenerator task, verify logs |
| Plugin ZIP under 500KB | `du -sh agentpress/` returns < 500K |

---

## Exclusion Audit (v1 Boundaries)

The following features are **explicitly NOT in v1**. Verify zero matches:

| Excluded Feature | Search Pattern | Expected Result |
|-----------------|----------------|-----------------|
| SEOMeta agent | `seo_meta`, `class-seo-meta` | Zero matches |
| Manual task runner | `task runner`, `manual.*run`, textarea for tasks | Zero matches |
| Developer registration API | `agentpress_register_capability` | Zero matches |
| Streaming/async | `stream`, `async.*task`, `queue` | Zero matches |
| BYOK (per-user keys) | `per.*user.*key`, `user_api_key` | Zero matches |
| Front-end chat widget | `chat_widget`, `shortcode`, `public.*ui` | Zero matches |
| Onboarding wizard | `wizard`, `onboarding`, `get.*started` | Zero matches |
| Encrypted storage | `base64_encode.*wp_hash`, `encrypt.*decrypt` | Zero matches |
| Canvas/drag-drop | `canvas`, `drag.*drop`, `figma` | Zero matches |
| WordPress bifurcation | No second platform code | Single plugin only |

---

## Files to Create or Modify

### New Files (17 total)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `agentpress/agentpress.php` | Main plugin file, activation/deactivation hooks |
| `agentpress/includes/class-parser.php` | JSON extraction and validation |
| `agentpress/includes/class-agents.php` | Capability registry, manifest builder |
| `agentpress/includes/class-logger.php` | CPT-based activity logging |
| `agentpress/includes/class-router.php` | Keyword map + Claude fallback routing |
| `agentpress/includes/class-rest-api.php` | REST endpoint registration and handler |
| `agentpress/includes/class-admin.php` | Admin menu and page rendering |
| `agentpress/includes/agents/class-content-writer.php` | ContentWriter agent implementation |
| `agentpress/includes/agents/class-image-generator.php` | ImageGenerator agent implementation |
| `agentpress/includes/agents/class-agent-third.php` | Placeholder stub for v2 |
| `agentpress/admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` | Minimal native WordPress styling |
| `agentpress/readme.txt` | WordPress.org distribution readme |
| `agentpress/tests/parser-test.php` | Parser edge-case test harness |

### Modified Files

None — this is a net-new plugin with no modifications to existing codebase.

---

## Success Criteria (from PRD)

- [x] Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 requirements are met
- [x] All tests pass
- [x] Plugin activates on WordPress 6.0+ without errors
- [x] Both built-in agents respond via REST API
- [x] Activity logs appear in admin dashboard
- [x] Average latency < 4000ms over 100+ tasks
- [x] Zero fatal PHP errors after 100 tasks
- [x] Plugin ZIP under 500KB

---

## Risk Mitigation

| Risk | Mitigation |
|------|------------|
| JSON parser collapses pipeline | Built in Wave 1 with 10+ edge-case tests before any agent logic |
| Image generation timeout | Timeout guard in agent, user-friendly error message |
| CPT logging bloats DB | Auto-prune on every insert, no revisions, no autosave |
| Admin UI ugly-premium gap | CSS minimal; reviewed against native WP patterns |
| Keyword map misses intent | Claude fallback always available |
| Third agent scope creep | Placeholder stub only; exclusion audit catches drift |

## Goals (from PRD)

### Primary Goal
Build **AgentForge** — a web application that lets non-developers design, test, and deploy multi-agent AI workflows. Think Zapier, but for orchestrating Claude agents.

### Success Criteria
1. Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 requirements are met
2. All tests pass
3. Visual canvas for building multi-agent workflows ships in v1
4. Non-developers can create, test, and deploy workflows without code

### Target Users
- Operations teams
- No-code builders
- Consultants

### Distribution Channels
- ProductHunt
- No-code communities
- LinkedIn

---

## Implementation Approach (from Debate Decisions)

### Core Architecture
| Decision | Resolution |
|----------|------------|
| Name | **Forge** — one word, four letters, no "Agent" |
| Platform | Web app only (no WordPress plugin in v1) |
| Canvas | Visual infinite canvas ships in v1 (white, no dark mode) |
| Node Types | Minimal core set only — no 47 types |
| Execution | Submit to existing daemon — zero new runtime |
| Performance | Parallel execution + aggressive caching, <3 second target |
| Economics | Token budgets + request deduplication day one |
| Monetization | Freemium billing CUT from v1 — ship love first |

### File Structure
```
forge/
├── app/                          # Web application (single platform)
│   ├── canvas/                   # Visual canvas engine — white, infinite, minimal
│   ├── nodes/                    # Core node components (limited palette)
│   ├── executor/                 # Submit-to-daemon wrapper
│   ├── preview/                  # Live preview / demo-state runner
│   └── voice/                    # Brand copy — human, confident, zero acronyms
├── daemon-bridge/                # Thin adapter to existing pipeline
│   ├── schema/                   # JSON workflow config schema (runtime only)
│   ├── validator/                # Config validation before submit
│   └── submitter/                # Job submission to existing daemon
├── cache/                        # Aggressive deterministic cache layer
├── budgets/                      # Token budgets & request deduplication
└── api/                          # Developer-facing API (JSON for those who want it)
```

### Technical Decisions
- **No Workers AI edge execution** — agents call Claude API directly
- **No JSON editor in-app** — visual only (developers use API)
- **One aesthetic** — white canvas, no dark mode, no advanced mode toggle
- **No onboarding wizard** — users land in a running orchestra, touch a node
- **No login wall for demo** — first 30 seconds are frictionless

### Explicitly NOT in v1
- Freemium billing / Stripe integration
- Dark mode
- Advanced / Pro / JSON-editing mode
- WordPress plugin variant
- Workers AI edge execution
- PowerPoint export, CSV templates
- More than a handful of node types

---

## Verification Criteria

### Canvas Engine
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Canvas renders as white infinite surface | Visual inspection + CSS computed value check |
| Nodes can be dragged and positioned | Integration test: drag node, assert new coordinates |
| Nodes can be connected via wires | Integration test: create connection, assert link exists in state |
| Limited node palette renders correctly | Count rendered node types, assert equals expected count |
| No dark mode toggle exists | Grep UI code for "dark" mode selectors, assert zero matches |

### Execution Pipeline
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Jobs submit to existing daemon | Mock daemon endpoint, assert POST request on workflow run |
| Independent nodes execute in parallel | Timing test: 3 independent nodes complete in ~max(single) not ~sum |
| Cache prevents duplicate API calls | Run identical workflow twice, assert second hit is instant |
| Token budgets enforce limits | Set budget=100, run workflow exceeding budget, assert early termination |
| Request deduplication works | Fire same request twice simultaneously, assert single API call |

### User Experience
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Landing page shows running demo state | Load page, assert canvas has pre-populated workflow |
| No login required for first use | Load page, assert no auth modal appears |
| No onboarding wizard/tooltips | Grep for tour/wizard/onboarding components, assert zero |
| Sub-3-second workflow execution (cached) | Timing test with cached inputs, assert <3000ms |

### Code Quality
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Zero TODO/FIXME/HACK comments | `grep -riE 'TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX' forge/` returns nothing |
| No placeholder code blocks | Grep for "implement me", "fix later", empty function bodies |
| TypeScript strict mode passes | `tsc --noEmit` exits 0 |
| No runtime dependencies beyond React | Check package.json dependencies list |

---

## Files to Create or Modify

### New Directories
```
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/canvas/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/nodes/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/executor/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/preview/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/voice/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/schema/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/validator/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/submitter/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/cache/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/budgets/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/api/
```

### New Files (Phase 1 Scope)
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `forge/package.json` | Module manifest with zero runtime dependencies |
| `forge/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript configuration (strict mode, ESM) |
| `forge/app/canvas/index.tsx` | Canvas root component |
| `forge/app/canvas/useCanvasState.ts` | Canvas state management hook |
| `forge/app/nodes/BaseNode.tsx` | Base node component |
| `forge/app/nodes/AgentNode.tsx` | Agent node component |
| `forge/app/nodes/TriggerNode.tsx` | Trigger node component |
| `forge/app/executor/DaemonExecutor.ts` | Daemon job submission logic |
| `forge/app/preview/PreviewRunner.tsx` | Live preview component |
| `forge/daemon-bridge/schema/workflow.ts` | Workflow JSON schema |
| `forge/daemon-bridge/validator/validate.ts` | Config validation |
| `forge/daemon-bridge/submitter/submit.ts` | Job submission |
| `forge/cache/CacheManager.ts` | Deterministic caching |
| `forge/budgets/TokenBudget.ts` | Token budget enforcement |
| `forge/api/routes.ts` | Developer API routes |

### Modified Files
| File | Modification |
|------|--------------|
| `STATUS.md` | Add Forge project to pipeline state |
| `TASKS.md` | Add Forge build tasks to dispatch board |

---

## Open Questions (To Resolve Before Build)

| # | Question | Owner |
|---|----------|-------|
| 1 | Distribution channel (Emdash plugin vs standalone) | Product/GTM |
| 2 | Live demo state mechanics (simulated vs real) | Elon |
| 3 | Exact node type roster (how many, which ones) | Steve |
| 4 | Developer API scope (ships v1 or deferred) | Elon |
| 5 | Hosting/deployment target (Cloudflare or other) | Elon |
| 6 | Auth model post-demo (when does login appear) | Elon + Steve |

---

## Notes

- This spec is derived from PRD #90 and locked debate decisions
- Implementation will follow the "Forge" architecture from decisions.md
- Test files are the specification — no separate detailed spec beyond this
- All code must pass TypeScript strict mode and zero-dependency checks

input.content:
# AgentPress v1 — Specification Document

**Issue**: sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 (AgentForge dream candidate)
**Project Slug**: `github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-90`
**Plan Source**: `.planning/phase-1-plan.md`
**Decisions Source**: `rounds/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-90/decisions.md`
**Status**: Pre-build
**Generated**: 2026-05-03

> **Note**: This spec implements the AgentForge vision as AgentPress v1 — a WordPress plugin that provides AI agent orchestration. The plugin is the v1 manifestation of the AgentForge dream: "Zapier for Claude agents."

---

## Goals (from PRD)

### Primary Goal
Build **AgentPress** — a WordPress plugin that lets non-developers design, test, and deploy multi-agent AI workflows via a simple REST API. Think Zapier, but for orchestrating Claude agents within WordPress.

### Success Criteria
1. Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 requirements are met
2. All tests pass
3. Plugin activates on WordPress 6.0+ without errors
4. Both built-in agents (ContentWriter, ImageGenerator) respond via REST API
5. Activity logs appear in admin dashboard
6. Average latency < 4000ms over 100+ tasks
7. Zero fatal PHP errors after 100 tasks
8. Plugin ZIP under 500KB

### Target Users
- Operations teams
- No-code builders
- Consultants
- WordPress site owners

### Distribution Channels
- WordPress.org plugin repository
- ProductHunt
- No-code communities
- LinkedIn

---

## Implementation Approach (from Plan)

### Core Architecture

| Decision | Resolution |
|----------|------------|
| Platform | WordPress plugin (single platform v1) |
| Agent Count | Two built-in agents only (ContentWriter, ImageGenerator) |
| Router | Local PHP keyword map + Claude fallback |
| Execution | Synchronous only, 30s timeout |
| Storage | CPT-based capability registry and activity log |
| Styling | Native WordPress admin styles, minimal custom CSS |
| Admin UI | Single screen under Tools menu, no tabs, no wizard |
| Key Storage | Plain options + wp-config.php constant override |
| Third Agent | Placeholder stub only (v2) |

### File Structure

```
agentpress/
├── agentpress.php                    # Main plugin file, activation hooks
├── includes/
│   ├── class-parser.php              # JSON extraction & validation
│   ├── class-agents.php              # Capability registry (CPT-based)
│   ├── class-logger.php              # Activity logging with auto-prune
│   ├── class-router.php              # Keyword map + Claude fallback
│   ├── class-rest-api.php            # Single REST endpoint
│   ├── class-admin.php               # Admin UI rendering
│   └── agents/
│       ├── class-content-writer.php  # Built-in: text generation
│       ├── class-image-generator.php # Built-in: image generation
│       └── class-agent-third.php     # Placeholder stub (v2)
├── admin/
│   └── css/
│       └── agentpress-admin.css      # Minimal native WP styling
├── tests/
│   └── parser-test.php               # Parser edge-case test harness
└── readme.txt                        # WordPress.org distribution
```

### Execution Flow

```
POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│  Auth Check     │ ← Nonce or Application Password
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│  Validate Task  │ ← Return 400 if missing
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│  Router::route  │ ← Local keyword map first
└────────┬────────┘
         │
    ┌────┴────┐
    │         │
Local      Claude
Match      Fallback
    │         │
    └────┬────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│ Agents::run_    │ ← Internal handler
│    internal()   │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│ Logger::log()   │ ← CPT entry with latency
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│ JSON Response   │ ← {success, routing, result, latency_ms}
└─────────────────┘
```

### Wave Sequencing

| Wave | Tasks | Theme | Parallel? |
|------|-------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | 1, 2, 3 | Foundation (bootstrap, parser, CSS) | Yes |
| 2 | 4, 5, 6, 7 | Core Classes (agents, logger, built-ins) | Yes |
| 3 | 8 | Orchestration (router) | Sequential |
| 4 | 9 | Integration (REST API) | Sequential |
| 5 | 10, 11 | Admin & Polish (UI, readme, audit) | Yes |

---

## Verification Criteria

### Wave 1 — Foundation

#### Task 1: Plugin Bootstrap + CPT Registration
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Plugin activates without fatal errors | Check `wp-content/debug.log` after activation |
| CPT `agentpress_capability` registered | `SELECT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = 'agentpress_capability'` returns rows |
| CPT `agentpress_log` registered | `SELECT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = 'agentpress_log'` returns rows |
| `agentpress_settings` option created | Query `wp_options` for `option_name = 'agentpress_settings'` |
| Built-in capabilities inserted on activation | Query returns `content_writer` and `image_generator` posts with correct meta |
| `agentpress_get_setting()` helper works | Call function with wp-config constant defined, verify fallback |
| Autoloader maps class names correctly | `new AgentPress\Parser` loads `includes/class-parser.php` |

#### Task 2: JSON Parser Hardening
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Test harness exists at `tests/parser-test.php` | File exists and is readable |
| All 10+ test cases pass | Run test harness, verify all cases return expected results |
| Markdown fence stripping works | Input: `` ```json{"capability":"x"}``` `` → Output: parsed array |
| Direct JSON decode works | Input: `{"capability":"x"}` → Output: parsed array |
| Recursive brace extraction works | Input: `text before {"capability":"x"} text after` → Extracts JSON |
| Truncated JSON returns WP_Error | Input: `{"capability":` → Output: WP_Error with `agentpress_parser_error` |
| Hallucinated slug rejected | Input: `{"capability":"seo_meta"}` → Output: WP_Error invalid capability |
| Missing capability key rejected | Input: `{"reasoning":"..."}` → Output: WP_Error missing capability |

#### Task 3: Admin CSS
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| File exists at `admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` | File exists |
| File under 100 lines | `wc -l admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns ≤ 100 |
| File under 3KB | `wc -c admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns ≤ 3072 |
| All selectors prefixed `.agentpress-` | Grep for selectors not starting with `.agentpress-` returns nothing |
| No `!important` declarations | `grep -i '!important' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing |
| No Tailwind/Bootstrap classes | `grep -E '(tw-|btn-|container)' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing |
| No custom font imports | `grep -i '@import' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing |

---

### Wave 2 — Core Classes

#### Task 4: Agents Base Class + Capability Registry
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| `Agents::get_capabilities()` returns 2 capabilities | Call method, verify array has `content_writer` and `image_generator` |
| `Agents::get_capability($slug)` returns single capability | Call with `content_writer`, verify single capability returned |
| `Agents::build_manifest()` returns serializable array | `json_encode(Agents::build_manifest())` succeeds |
| No `agentpress_register_capability()` function exists | `grep -r 'function agentpress_register_capability' includes/` returns nothing |
| `agentpress_init` action hook fires | Add action, verify callback executes during init |

#### Task 5: Activity Logger
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| `Logger::log()` creates CPT entry | Call method, verify row in `wp_posts` with `post_type = 'agentpress_log'` |
| Log meta fields stored correctly | Query post_meta for `_agentpress_capability`, `_agentpress_payload`, `_agentpress_result`, `_agentpress_latency_ms`, `_agentpress_status` |
| Auto-prune works at 500+ entries | Insert 505 entries, verify oldest 50 deleted, count ≤ 550 |
| No revisions for log posts | Query `wp_posts` for `post_type = 'revision'` with log post_parent returns nothing |
| `Logger::get_recent(50)` returns logs | Call method, verify array of log objects with meta |

#### Task 6: ContentWriter Agent
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| `Content_Writer::run()` validates required `topic` | Call without topic, verify WP_Error returned |
| `Content_Writer::run()` validates `tone` enum | Call with `tone=casual`, verify WP_Error; `tone=friendly` succeeds |
| `Content_Writer::run()` validates `length` enum | Call with `length=tiny`, verify WP_Error; `length=short` succeeds |
| Claude API called with correct headers | Mock test verifies `x-api-key`, `anthropic-version`, `Content-Type` headers |
| Output truncated to 2048 chars | Mock long response, verify `strlen(result['text'])` ≤ 2048 |
| `tokens_used` returned in response | Verify response contains `tokens_used` integer |
| `agentpress_run_content_writer()` handler registered | Function exists and is callable |

#### Task 7: ImageGenerator Agent
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| `Image_Generator::run()` validates required `prompt` | Call without prompt, verify WP_Error returned |
| `Image_Generator::run()` validates `size` enum | Call with `size=2048x2048`, verify WP_Error; `size=512x512` succeeds |
| CF Worker URL called via wp_remote_post | Mock test verifies POST to configured URL |
| HTTPS guardrail works | Mock HTTP URL response, verify WP_Error rejected |
| Timeout handled gracefully | Mock timeout, verify WP_Error with user-friendly message |
| Response contains `url`, `format`, `size` | Verify response shape matches spec |
| `agentpress_run_image_generator()` handler registered | Function exists and is callable |

---

### Wave 3 — Orchestration

#### Task 8: Router — Keyword Map + Claude Fallback
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Content keywords route to `content_writer` | `Router::route('write a blog post')` returns `capability=content_writer`, `source=local` |
| Image keywords route to `image_generator` | `Router::route('generate an image')` returns `capability=image_generator`, `source=local` |
| Ambiguous input triggers Claude fallback | `Router::route('something vague')` with valid API key returns `source=claude` |
| Local routing does NOT call Claude API | Monitor HTTP requests during local route, verify zero Anthropic calls |
| Unknown capability returns WP_Error | Claude returns `capability=none`, verify WP_Error with `agentpress_no_match` |
| Routing decision logged | Verify log entry contains routing info |

---

### Wave 4 — Integration

#### Task 9: REST API Endpoint
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Endpoint registered at `/wp-json/agentpress/v1/run` | GET returns 404, POST accepted |
| Unauthenticated request returns 401/403 | `curl POST` without auth returns unauthorized |
| Missing `task` returns 400 `agentpress_missing_task` | `curl -d '{}'` with auth returns 400 |
| ContentWriter task returns 200 with `result.text` | `curl -d '{"task":"write about AI"}'` with valid API key |
| ImageGenerator task returns 200 with `result.url` | `curl -d '{"task":"make an image"}'` with valid Worker URL |
| Response contains `routing`, `result`, `latency_ms` | Verify JSON shape matches spec |
| Log entries created in CPT | Query `agentpress_log` after requests, verify entries exist |
| Error response contains `code`, `message`, `data` | Trigger error, verify structured error shape |
| Timeout returns 500 with `agentpress_timeout` | Mock timeout, verify error code |

---

### Wave 5 — Admin & Polish

#### Task 10: Admin UI
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Page appears under Tools menu | Navigate to wp-admin → Tools → AgentPress |
| Page slug is `tools-agentpress` | Verify menu registration |
| No tabs on admin page | Visual inspection, no tab navigation HTML |
| No manual task runner textarea | Search page HTML for task input textarea, verify none |
| Settings form uses WordPress Settings API | Verify `settings_fields()`, `do_settings_sections()` calls |
| Claude API key field is password type | Verify `<input type="password">` |
| wp-config constant disables field | Define `AGENTPRESS_CLAUDE_KEY`, verify field disabled with note |
| Settings persist after save | Enter API key, save, reload, verify value persists |
| Log table displays after REST tasks | Run tasks via cURL, verify log rows appear |
| Status pills colored correctly | Green for success, red for error |
| CSS enqueued only on AgentPress page | Check `admin_enqueue_scripts` hook |

#### Task 11: Readme + Integration + Exclusion Audit
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| `readme.txt` has valid WP.org header | Header contains `=== AgentPress ===`, contributors, tags, requires |
| Description is ~3 paragraphs | Count paragraph blocks in description |
| Installation section exists | Verify upload/activate steps documented |
| API example with cURL included | Verify cURL command for POST endpoint |
| API disclosure statement included | Verify Anthropic ToS disclosure |
| No billing/SaaS mentions | Grep for "Pro", "Premium", "tier", "billing" returns nothing |
| Exclusion audit passes | Search codebase for excluded features (see below) |
| Smoke test completes | Activate, run both agent tasks, verify logs |
| Plugin ZIP under 500KB | `du -sh agentpress/` returns < 500K |

---

## Exclusion Audit (v1 Boundaries)

The following features are **explicitly NOT in v1**. Verify zero matches:

| Excluded Feature | Search Pattern | Expected Result |
|-----------------|----------------|-----------------|
| SEOMeta agent | `seo_meta`, `class-seo-meta.php` | Zero matches |
| Manual task runner | `task.*runner`, textarea for manual tasks | Zero matches |
| Developer registration API | `agentpress_register_capability` | Zero matches |
| Streaming responses | `stream.*true`, `wp_stream` | Zero matches |
| Async queue processing | `wp_cron.*task`, `async.*queue` | Zero matches |
| BYOK (per-user keys) | `user.*api.*key`, `per.*user.*key` | Zero matches |
| Front-end chat widget | `chat_widget`, `shortcode`, `public.*ui` | Zero matches |
| Onboarding wizard | `wizard`, `onboarding`, `get.*started`, `tour` | Zero matches |
| Encrypted storage | `base64_encode.*wp_hash`, `openssl_encrypt` | Zero matches |
| Canvas/drag-drop UI | `canvas`, `drag.*drop`, `figma` | Zero matches |
| WordPress plugin bifurcation | No second platform code | Single plugin only |
| Workers AI edge execution | `workers.*ai`, `edge.*runtime` | Zero matches |

---

## Files to Create or Modify

### New Files (14 total)

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `agentpress/agentpress.php` | Main plugin file, activation/deactivation hooks, autoloader |
| `agentpress/includes/class-parser.php` | JSON extraction and validation (hardened) |
| `agentpress/includes/class-agents.php` | Capability registry, manifest builder |
| `agentpress/includes/class-logger.php` | CPT-based activity logging with auto-prune |
| `agentpress/includes/class-router.php` | Keyword map + Claude fallback routing |
| `agentpress/includes/class-rest-api.php` | REST endpoint registration and handler |
| `agentpress/includes/class-admin.php` | Admin menu and page rendering |
| `agentpress/includes/agents/class-content-writer.php` | ContentWriter agent implementation |
| `agentpress/includes/agents/class-image-generator.php` | ImageGenerator agent implementation |
| `agentpress/includes/agents/class-agent-third.php` | Placeholder stub for v2 |
| `agentpress/admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` | Minimal native WordPress styling |
| `agentpress/tests/parser-test.php` | Parser edge-case test harness |
| `agentpress/readme.txt` | WordPress.org distribution readme |

### Modified Files

None — this is a net-new plugin with no modifications to existing codebase.

---

## Requirements Traceability

| Requirement ID | Task | Wave |
|----------------|------|------|
| R-001 to R-004 | Task 1 | 1 |
| R-019 to R-023 | Task 2 | 1 |
| R-050 | Task 3 | 1 |
| R-037 to R-039 | Task 4 | 2 |
| R-040 to R-042 | Task 5 | 2 |
| R-024 to R-028 | Task 6 | 2 |
| R-029 to R-034 | Task 7 | 2 |
| R-014 to R-018 | Task 8 | 3 |
| R-005 to R-013, R-063 | Task 9 | 4 |
| R-044 to R-053 | Task 10 | 5 |
| R-057 to R-075 | Task 11 | 5 |

---

## Risk Mitigation

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------|
| JSON parser collapses pipeline | High | Critical | Built in Wave 1 with 10+ edge-case tests before any agent logic |
| Image generation timeout on shared host | Medium | Medium | Timeout guard in agent, user-friendly error message |
| CPT logging bloats DB | Medium | High | Auto-prune on every insert, no revisions, no autosave |
| Admin UI ugly-premium gap | Medium | Medium | CSS minimal; reviewed against native WP patterns |
| Keyword map misses intent | Medium | High | Claude fallback always available |
| Third agent scope creep | Medium | Medium | Placeholder stub only; exclusion audit catches drift |
| WordPress.org rejection | Low | High | API disclosure in readme.txt |

---

## Success Metrics

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Plugin activation | Zero fatal errors | `wp-content/debug.log` after activation |
| API response time | < 4000ms average | `latency_ms` field over 100+ tasks |
| Error handling | Zero fatal errors | All errors return structured JSON |
| Plugin size | < 500KB | `du -sh agentpress/` |
| Test coverage | Parser 10+ edge cases | `tests/parser-test.php` |

# AgentPress v1 — Specification Document

**Issue**: sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 (AgentForge dream candidate)
**Project Slug**: `github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-90`
**Plan Source**: `.planning/phase-1-plan.md`
**Decisions Source**: `rounds/github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-90/decisions.md`
**Status**: Pre-build
**Generated**: 2026-05-03

> **Note**: This spec implements the AgentForge vision as AgentPress v1 — a WordPress plugin that provides AI agent orchestration. The plugin is the v1 manifestation of the AgentForge dream: "Zapier for Claude agents."

---

## Goals (from PRD)

### Primary Goal
Build **AgentPress** — a WordPress plugin that lets non-developers design, test, and deploy multi-agent AI workflows via a simple REST API. Think Zapier, but for orchestrating Claude agents within WordPress.

### Success Criteria
1. Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 requirements are met
2. All tests pass
3. Plugin activates on WordPress 6.0+ without errors
4. Both built-in agents (ContentWriter, ImageGenerator) respond via REST API
5. Activity logs appear in admin dashboard
6. Average latency < 4000ms over 100+ tasks
7. Zero fatal PHP errors after 100 tasks
8. Plugin ZIP under 500KB

### Target Users
- Operations teams
- No-code builders
- Consultants
- WordPress site owners

### Distribution Channels
- WordPress.org plugin repository
- ProductHunt
- No-code communities
- LinkedIn

---

## Implementation Approach (from Plan)

### Core Architecture

| Decision | Resolution |
|----------|------------|
| Platform | WordPress plugin (single platform v1) |
| Agent Count | Two built-in agents only (ContentWriter, ImageGenerator) |
| Router | Local PHP keyword map + Claude fallback |
| Execution | Synchronous only, 30s timeout |
| Storage | CPT-based capability registry and activity log |
| Styling | Native WordPress admin styles, minimal custom CSS |
| Admin UI | Single screen under Tools menu, no tabs, no wizard |
| Key Storage | Plain options + wp-config.php constant override |
| Third Agent | Placeholder stub only (v2) |

### File Structure

```
agentpress/
├── agentpress.php                    # Main plugin file, activation hooks
├── includes/
│   ├── class-parser.php              # JSON extraction & validation
│   ├── class-agents.php              # Capability registry (CPT-based)
│   ├── class-logger.php              # Activity logging with auto-prune
│   ├── class-router.php              # Keyword map + Claude fallback
│   ├── class-rest-api.php            # Single REST endpoint
│   ├── class-admin.php               # Admin UI rendering
│   └── agents/
│       ├── class-content-writer.php  # Built-in: text generation
│       ├── class-image-generator.php # Built-in: image generation
│       └── class-agent-third.php     # Placeholder stub (v2)
├── admin/
│   └── css/
│       └── agentpress-admin.css      # Minimal native WP styling
├── tests/
│   └── parser-test.php               # Parser edge-case test harness
└── readme.txt                        # WordPress.org distribution
```

### Execution Flow

```
POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│  Auth Check     │ ← Nonce or Application Password
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│  Validate Task  │ ← Return 400 if missing
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│  Router::route  │ ← Local keyword map first
└────────┬────────┘
         │
    ┌────┴────┐
    │         │
Local      Claude
Match      Fallback
    │         │
    └────┬────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│ Agents::run_    │ ← Internal handler
│    internal()   │
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│ Logger::log()   │ ← CPT entry with latency
└────────┬────────┘
         │
         ▼
┌─────────────────┐
│ JSON Response   │ ← {success, routing, result, latency_ms}
└─────────────────┘
```

### Wave Sequencing

| Wave | Tasks | Theme | Parallel? |
|------|-------|-------|-----------|
| 1 | 1, 2, 3 | Foundation (bootstrap, parser, CSS) | Yes |
| 2 | 4, 5, 6, 7 | Core Classes (agents, logger, built-ins) | Yes |
| 3 | 8 | Orchestration (router) | Sequential |
| 4 | 9 | Integration (REST API) | Sequential |
| 5 | 10, 11 | Admin & Polish (UI, readme, audit) | Yes |

---

## Verification Criteria

### Wave 1 — Foundation

#### Task 1: Plugin Bootstrap + CPT Registration
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Plugin activates without fatal errors | Check `wp-content/debug.log` after activation |
| CPT `agentpress_capability` registered | `SELECT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = 'agentpress_capability'` returns rows |
| CPT `agentpress_log` registered | `SELECT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = 'agentpress_log'` returns rows |
| `agentpress_settings` option created | Query `wp_options` for `option_name = 'agentpress_settings'` |
| Built-in capabilities inserted on activation | Query returns `content_writer` and `image_generator` posts with correct meta |
| `agentpress_get_setting()` helper works | Call function with wp-config constant defined, verify fallback |
| Autoloader maps class names correctly | `new AgentPress\Parser` loads `includes/class-parser.php` |

#### Task 2: JSON Parser Hardening
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Test harness exists at `tests/parser-test.php` | File exists and is readable |
| All 10+ test cases pass | Run test harness, verify all cases return expected results |
| Markdown fence stripping works | Input: `` ```json{"capability":"x"}``` `` → Output: parsed array |
| Direct JSON decode works | Input: `{"capability":"x"}` → Output: parsed array |
| Recursive brace extraction works | Input: `text before {"capability":"x"} text after` → Extracts JSON |
| Truncated JSON returns WP_Error | Input: `{"capability":` → Output: WP_Error with `agentpress_parser_error` |
| Hallucinated slug rejected | Input: `{"capability":"seo_meta"}` → Output: WP_Error invalid capability |
| Missing capability key rejected | Input: `{"reasoning":"..."}` → Output: WP_Error missing capability |

| R-024 to R-028 | Task 6 | 2 |
| R-029 to R-034 | Task 7 | 2 |
| R-014 to R-018 | Task 8 | 3 |
| R-005 to R-013, R-063 | Task 9 | 4 |
| R-044 to R-053 | Task 10 | 5 |
| R-057 to R-075 | Task 11 | 5 |

---

## Risk Mitigation

| Risk | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation |
|------|------------|--------|------------|
| JSON parser collapses pipeline | High | Critical | Built in Wave 1 with 10+ edge-case tests before any agent logic |
| Image generation timeout on shared host | Medium | Medium | Timeout guard in agent, user-friendly error message |
| CPT logging bloats DB | Medium | High | Auto-prune on every insert, no revisions, no autosave |
| Admin UI ugly-premium gap | Medium | Medium | CSS minimal; reviewed against native WP patterns |
| Keyword map misses intent | Medium | High | Claude fallback always available |
| Third agent scope creep | Medium | Medium | Placeholder stub only; exclusion audit catches drift |
| WordPress.org rejection | Low | High | API disclosure in readme.txt |

---

## Success Metrics

| Metric | Target | Measurement |
|--------|--------|-------------|
| Plugin activation | Zero fatal errors | `wp-content/debug.log` after activation |
| API response time | < 4000ms average | `latency_ms` field over 100+ tasks |
| Error handling | Zero fatal errors | All errors return structured JSON |
| Plugin size | < 500KB | `du -sh agentpress/` |
| Test coverage | Parser 10+ edge cases | `tests/parser-test.php` |

lines: -# Forge — Specification Document
+# AgentPress v1 — Specification Document
-**Issue**: sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90
+**Issue**: sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 (AgentForge dream candidate)

+> **Note**: This spec implements the AgentForge vision as AgentPress v1 — a WordPress plugin that provides AI agent orchestration. The plugin is the v1 manifestation of the AgentForge dream: "Zapier for Claude agents."
## Goals (from PRD)
### Primary Goal
-Build **AgentForge** — a web application that lets non-developers design, test, and deploy multi-agent AI workflows. Think Zapier, but for orchestrating Claude agents.

+Build **AgentPress** — a WordPress plugin that lets non-developers design, test, and deploy multi-agent AI workflows via a simple REST API. Think Zapier, but for orchestrating Claude agents within WordPress.
### Success Criteria
1. Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 requirements are met
2. All tests pass
-3. Visual canvas for building multi-agent workflows ships in v1
-4. Non-developers can create, test, and deploy workflows without code
+3. Plugin activates on WordPress 6.0+ without errors
+4. Both built-in agents (ContentWriter, ImageGenerator) respond via REST API
+5. Activity logs appear in admin dashboard
+6. Average latency < 4000ms over 100+ tasks
+7. Zero fatal PHP errors after 100 tasks
+8. Plugin ZIP under 500KB
### Target Users
- Operations teams
- No-code builders
- Consultants
+- WordPress site owners
### Distribution Channels
+- WordPress.org plugin repository
- ProductHunt
- No-code communities
- LinkedIn
-## Implementation Approach (from Debate Decisions)
+## Implementation Approach (from Plan)
### Core Architecture
| Decision | Resolution |
-| Name | **Forge** — one word, four letters, no "Agent" |
-| Platform | Web app only (no WordPress plugin in v1) |
-| Canvas | Visual infinite canvas ships in v1 (white, no dark mode) |
-| Node Types | Minimal core set only — no 47 types |
-| Execution | Submit to existing daemon — zero new runtime |
-| Performance | Parallel execution + aggressive caching, <3 second target |
-| Economics | Token budgets + request deduplication day one |
-| Monetization | Freemium billing CUT from v1 — ship love first |
+| Platform | WordPress plugin (single platform v1) |
+| Agent Count | Two built-in agents only (ContentWriter, ImageGenerator) |
+| Router | Local PHP keyword map + Claude fallback |
+| Execution | Synchronous only, 30s timeout |
+| Storage | CPT-based capability registry and activity log |
+| Styling | Native WordPress admin styles, minimal custom CSS |
+| Admin UI | Single screen under Tools menu, no tabs, no wizard |
+| Key Storage | Plain options + wp-config.php constant override |
+| Third Agent | Placeholder stub only (v2) |
### File Structure
-forge/
-├── app/                          # Web application (single platform)
-│   ├── canvas/                   # Visual canvas engine — white, infinite, minimal
-│   ├── nodes/                    # Core node components (limited palette)
-│   ├── executor/                 # Submit-to-daemon wrapper

-├── daemon-bridge/                # Thin adapter to existing pipeline
-│   ├── schema/                   # JSON workflow config schema (runtime only)
-│   ├── validator/                # Config validation before submit
-│   └── submitter/                # Job submission to existing daemon
-├── cache/                        # Aggressive deterministic cache layer
-├── budgets/                      # Token budgets & request deduplication
-└── api/                          # Developer-facing API (JSON for those who want it)
+agentpress/
+├── agentpress.php                    # Main plugin file, activation hooks
+├── includes/
+│   ├── class-parser.php              # JSON extraction & validation
+│   ├── class-agents.php              # Capability registry (CPT-based)
+│   ├── class-logger.php              # Activity logging with auto-prune
+│   ├── class-router.php              # Keyword map + Claude fallback
+│   ├── class-rest-api.php            # Single REST endpoint
+│   ├── class-admin.php               # Admin UI rendering
+│   └── agents/
+│       ├── class-content-writer.php  # Built-in: text generation
+│       ├── class-image-generator.php # Built-in: image generation
+│       └── class-agent-third.php     # Placeholder stub (v2)
+├── admin/
+│       └── agentpress-admin.css      # Minimal native WP styling
+├── tests/
+│   └── parser-test.php               # Parser edge-case test harness
+└── readme.txt                        # WordPress.org distribution
-### Technical Decisions
-- **No Workers AI edge execution** — agents call Claude API directly
-- **No JSON editor in-app** — visual only (developers use API)
-- **One aesthetic** — white canvas, no dark mode, no advanced mode toggle
-- **No onboarding wizard** — users land in a running orchestra, touch a node
-- **No login wall for demo** — first 30 seconds are frictionless
+### Execution Flow
-### Explicitly NOT in v1
-- Freemium billing / Stripe integration
-- Dark mode
-- Advanced / Pro / JSON-editing mode
-- WordPress plugin variant
-- Workers AI edge execution
-- PowerPoint export, CSV templates
-- More than a handful of node types
+POST /wp-json/agentpress/v1/run
+│  Auth Check     │ ← Nonce or Application Password
+│  Validate Task  │ ← Return 400 if missing
+│  Router::route  │ ← Local keyword map first
+Local      Claude
+Match      Fallback
+│ Agents::run_    │ ← Internal handler
+│    internal()   │
+│ Logger::log()   │ ← CPT entry with latency
+│ JSON Response   │ ← {success, routing, result, latency_ms}
+### Wave Sequencing
+| Wave | Tasks | Theme | Parallel? |
+| 1 | 1, 2, 3 | Foundation (bootstrap, parser, CSS) | Yes |
+| 2 | 4, 5, 6, 7 | Core Classes (agents, logger, built-ins) | Yes |
+| 3 | 8 | Orchestration (router) | Sequential |
+| 4 | 9 | Integration (REST API) | Sequential |
+| 5 | 10, 11 | Admin & Polish (UI, readme, audit) | Yes |
## Verification Criteria
-### Canvas Engine
+### Wave 1 — Foundation
+#### Task 1: Plugin Bootstrap + CPT Registration

+| CPT `agentpress_log` registered | `SELECT post_type FROM wp_posts WHERE post_type = 'agentpress_log'` returns rows |

-### Execution Pipeline
+#### Task 2: JSON Parser Hardening
| Criterion | Verification Method |
-| Jobs submit to existing daemon | Mock daemon endpoint, assert POST request on workflow run |
-| Independent nodes execute in parallel | Timing test: 3 independent nodes complete in ~max(single) not ~sum |
-| Cache prevents duplicate API calls | Run identical workflow twice, assert second hit is instant |
-| Token budgets enforce limits | Set budget=100, run workflow exceeding budget, assert early termination |
-| Request deduplication works | Fire same request twice simultaneously, assert single API call |
+| Test harness exists at `tests/parser-test.php` | File exists and is readable |
+| All 10+ test cases pass | Run test harness, verify all cases return expected results |
+| Markdown fence stripping works | Input: `` ```json{"capability":"x"}``` `` → Output: parsed array |
+| Direct JSON decode works | Input: `{"capability":"x"}` → Output: parsed array |
+| Recursive brace extraction works | Input: `text before {"capability":"x"} text after` → Extracts JSON |
+| Truncated JSON returns WP_Error | Input: `{"capability":` → Output: WP_Error with `agentpress_parser_error` |
+| Hallucinated slug rejected | Input: `{"capability":"seo_meta"}` → Output: WP_Error invalid capability |
+| Missing capability key rejected | Input: `{"reasoning":"..."}` → Output: WP_Error missing capability |
-### User Experience
+#### Task 3: Admin CSS
| Criterion | Verification Method |
-| Landing page shows running demo state | Load page, assert canvas has pre-populated workflow |
-| No login required for first use | Load page, assert no auth modal appears |
-| No onboarding wizard/tooltips | Grep for tour/wizard/onboarding components, assert zero |
-| Sub-3-second workflow execution (cached) | Timing test with cached inputs, assert <3000ms |
+| File exists at `admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` | File exists |
+| File under 100 lines | `wc -l admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns ≤ 100 |
+| File under 3KB | `wc -c admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns ≤ 3072 |
+| All selectors prefixed `.agentpress-` | Grep for selectors not starting with `.agentpress-` returns nothing |

+| No Tailwind/Bootstrap classes | `grep -E '(tw-|btn-|container)' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing |
+| No custom font imports | `grep -i '@import' admin/css/agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing |
-### Code Quality
+### Wave 2 — Core Classes
+#### Task 4: Agents Base Class + Capability Registry
| Criterion | Verification Method |
-| Zero TODO/FIXME/HACK comments | `grep -riE 'TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX' forge/` returns nothing |

+| Auto-prune works at 500+ entries | Insert 505 entries, verify oldest 50 deleted, count ≤ 550 |

+#### Task 7: ImageGenerator Agent

+### Wave 3 — Orchestration

+#### Task 11: Readme + Integration + Exclusion Audit
