# Forge — Specification Document

**Issue**: sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90
**Project Slug**: `github-issue-sethshoultes-shipyard-ai-90`
**Status**: Pre-build
**Generated**: 2026-05-02

---

## Goals (from PRD)

### Primary Goal
Build **AgentForge** — a web application that lets non-developers design, test, and deploy multi-agent AI workflows. Think Zapier, but for orchestrating Claude agents.

### Success Criteria
1. Issue sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90 requirements are met
2. All tests pass
3. Visual canvas for building multi-agent workflows ships in v1
4. Non-developers can create, test, and deploy workflows without code

### Target Users
- Operations teams
- No-code builders
- Consultants

### Distribution Channels
- ProductHunt
- No-code communities
- LinkedIn

---

## Implementation Approach (from Debate Decisions)

### Core Architecture
| Decision | Resolution |
|----------|------------|
| Name | **Forge** — one word, four letters, no "Agent" |
| Platform | Web app only (no WordPress plugin in v1) |
| Canvas | Visual infinite canvas ships in v1 (white, no dark mode) |
| Node Types | Minimal core set only — no 47 types |
| Execution | Submit to existing daemon — zero new runtime |
| Performance | Parallel execution + aggressive caching, <3 second target |
| Economics | Token budgets + request deduplication day one |
| Monetization | Freemium billing CUT from v1 — ship love first |

### File Structure
```
forge/
├── app/                          # Web application (single platform)
│   ├── canvas/                   # Visual canvas engine — white, infinite, minimal
│   ├── nodes/                    # Core node components (limited palette)
│   ├── executor/                 # Submit-to-daemon wrapper
│   ├── preview/                  # Live preview / demo-state runner
│   └── voice/                    # Brand copy — human, confident, zero acronyms
├── daemon-bridge/                # Thin adapter to existing pipeline
│   ├── schema/                   # JSON workflow config schema (runtime only)
│   ├── validator/                # Config validation before submit
│   └── submitter/                # Job submission to existing daemon
├── cache/                        # Aggressive deterministic cache layer
├── budgets/                      # Token budgets & request deduplication
└── api/                          # Developer-facing API (JSON for those who want it)
```

### Technical Decisions
- **No Workers AI edge execution** — agents call Claude API directly
- **No JSON editor in-app** — visual only (developers use API)
- **One aesthetic** — white canvas, no dark mode, no advanced mode toggle
- **No onboarding wizard** — users land in a running orchestra, touch a node
- **No login wall for demo** — first 30 seconds are frictionless

### Explicitly NOT in v1
- Freemium billing / Stripe integration
- Dark mode
- Advanced / Pro / JSON-editing mode
- WordPress plugin variant
- Workers AI edge execution
- PowerPoint export, CSV templates
- More than a handful of node types

---

## Verification Criteria

### Canvas Engine
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Canvas renders as white infinite surface | Visual inspection + CSS computed value check |
| Nodes can be dragged and positioned | Integration test: drag node, assert new coordinates |
| Nodes can be connected via wires | Integration test: create connection, assert link exists in state |
| Limited node palette renders correctly | Count rendered node types, assert equals expected count |
| No dark mode toggle exists | Grep UI code for "dark" mode selectors, assert zero matches |

### Execution Pipeline
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Jobs submit to existing daemon | Mock daemon endpoint, assert POST request on workflow run |
| Independent nodes execute in parallel | Timing test: 3 independent nodes complete in ~max(single) not ~sum |
| Cache prevents duplicate API calls | Run identical workflow twice, assert second hit is instant |
| Token budgets enforce limits | Set budget=100, run workflow exceeding budget, assert early termination |
| Request deduplication works | Fire same request twice simultaneously, assert single API call |

### User Experience
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Landing page shows running demo state | Load page, assert canvas has pre-populated workflow |
| No login required for first use | Load page, assert no auth modal appears |
| No onboarding wizard/tooltips | Grep for tour/wizard/onboarding components, assert zero |
| Sub-3-second workflow execution (cached) | Timing test with cached inputs, assert <3000ms |

### Code Quality
| Criterion | Verification Method |
|-----------|---------------------|
| Zero TODO/FIXME/HACK comments | `grep -riE 'TODO|FIXME|HACK|XXX' forge/` returns nothing |
| No placeholder code blocks | Grep for "implement me", "fix later", empty function bodies |
| TypeScript strict mode passes | `tsc --noEmit` exits 0 |
| No runtime dependencies beyond React | Check package.json dependencies list |

---

## Files to Create or Modify

### New Directories
```
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/canvas/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/nodes/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/executor/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/preview/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/app/voice/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/schema/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/validator/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/daemon-bridge/submitter/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/cache/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/budgets/
/home/agent/shipyard-ai/forge/api/
```

### New Files (Phase 1 Scope)
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `forge/package.json` | Module manifest with zero runtime dependencies |
| `forge/tsconfig.json` | TypeScript configuration (strict mode, ESM) |
| `forge/app/canvas/index.tsx` | Canvas root component |
| `forge/app/canvas/useCanvasState.ts` | Canvas state management hook |
| `forge/app/nodes/BaseNode.tsx` | Base node component |
| `forge/app/nodes/AgentNode.tsx` | Agent node component |
| `forge/app/nodes/TriggerNode.tsx` | Trigger node component |
| `forge/app/executor/DaemonExecutor.ts` | Daemon job submission logic |
| `forge/app/preview/PreviewRunner.tsx` | Live preview component |
| `forge/daemon-bridge/schema/workflow.ts` | Workflow JSON schema |
| `forge/daemon-bridge/validator/validate.ts` | Config validation |
| `forge/daemon-bridge/submitter/submit.ts` | Job submission |
| `forge/cache/CacheManager.ts` | Deterministic caching |
| `forge/budgets/TokenBudget.ts` | Token budget enforcement |
| `forge/api/routes.ts` | Developer API routes |

### Modified Files
| File | Modification |
|------|--------------|
| `STATUS.md` | Add Forge project to pipeline state |
| `TASKS.md` | Add Forge build tasks to dispatch board |

---

## Open Questions (To Resolve Before Build)

| # | Question | Owner |
|---|----------|-------|
| 1 | Distribution channel (Emdash plugin vs standalone) | Product/GTM |
| 2 | Live demo state mechanics (simulated vs real) | Elon |
| 3 | Exact node type roster (how many, which ones) | Steve |
| 4 | Developer API scope (ships v1 or deferred) | Elon |
| 5 | Hosting/deployment target (Cloudflare or other) | Elon |
| 6 | Auth model post-demo (when does login appear) | Elon + Steve |

---

## Notes

- This spec is derived from PRD #90 and locked debate decisions
- Implementation will follow the "Forge" architecture from decisions.md
- Test files are the specification — no separate detailed spec beyond this
- All code must pass TypeScript strict mode and zero-dependency checks

# AgentPress v1 — To-Do List

**Issue**: sethshoultes/shipyard-ai#90
**Plan**: `.planning/phase-1-plan.md`
**Last Updated**: 2026-05-03

---

## Wave 1: Foundation (Parallel)

### Task 1: Plugin Bootstrap + CPT Registration

- [ ] Create `agentpress/` directory — verify: `ls -la agentpress/` shows directory exists
- [ ] Create `agentpress/agentpress.php` with WP plugin header — verify: file contains `Plugin Name: AgentPress`, `Version: 1.0.0`, `Text Domain: agentpress`
- [ ] Define plugin constants (`AGENTPRESS_VERSION`, `AGENTPRESS_PLUGIN_DIR`, `AGENTPRESS_PLUGIN_URL`) — verify: constants defined with `define()` calls
- [ ] Write activation hook registering `agentpress_capability` CPT — verify: CPT registered with `public => false`, `show_ui => false`
- [ ] Write activation hook registering `agentpress_log` CPT — verify: CPT registered with `supports => array()`, no revisions
- [ ] Insert `content_writer` capability post on activation — verify: post exists with `_agentpress_name` = "Content Writer"
- [ ] Insert `image_generator` capability post on activation — verify: post exists with `_agentpress_name` = "Image Generator"
- [ ] Create default `agentpress_settings` option — verify: option contains `claude_api_key`, `cf_worker_url`, `default_model`, `installed_version`
- [ ] Implement `agentpress_get_setting($key)` helper — verify: function checks wp-config constants before option value
- [ ] Write autoloader mapping class names to files — verify: `new AgentPress\Parser` loads correct file
- [ ] Hook `plugins_loaded` to initialize core classes — verify: classes instantiated in order
- [ ] Write deactivation hook flushing rewrite rules — verify: `flush_rewrite_rules()` called on deactivation
- [ ] Test plugin activation on clean WordPress — verify: no fatal errors in `wp-content/debug.log`

### Task 2: JSON Parser Hardening

- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/class-parser.php` — verify: file exists with namespace `AgentPress`
- [ ] Implement `Parser::extract_json()` with direct `json_decode()` — verify: method tries `JSON_THROW_ON_ERROR` first
- [ ] Add markdown fence stripping regex — verify: regex `/^```json\s*|\s*```$/m` present
- [ ] Add recursive brace extraction fallback — verify: method extracts first `{...}` block
- [ ] Return WP_Error on all failures — verify: error code is `agentpress_parser_error`
- [ ] Implement `Parser::validate_routing_json()` — verify: checks `capability` key exists and is string
- [ ] Implement `Parser::sanitize_payload()` — verify: applies `wp_kses_post` to string values
- [ ] Create `agentpress/tests/parser-test.php` test harness — verify: file exists with 10+ test cases
- [ ] Add test case: valid JSON — verify: returns parsed array
- [ ] Add test case: markdown-fenced JSON — verify: strips fences, returns parsed array
- [ ] Add test case: truncated JSON — verify: returns WP_Error, not fatal
- [ ] Add test case: missing capability key — verify: returns WP_Error
- [ ] Add test case: hallucinated slug (`seo_meta`) — verify: returns WP_Error invalid capability
- [ ] Add test case: nested payload — verify: parses correctly
- [ ] Add test case: empty response — verify: returns WP_Error
- [ ] Add test case: HTML-wrapped JSON — verify: extracts JSON
- [ ] Add test case: extra text before/after JSON — verify: extracts JSON
- [ ] Add test case: invalid JSON syntax — verify: returns WP_Error
- [ ] Run all test cases manually — verify: all pass with expected results

### Task 3: Admin CSS

- [ ] Create `agentpress/admin/css/` directory — verify: `ls agentpress/admin/css/` succeeds
- [ ] Create `agentpress-admin.css` file — verify: file exists
- [ ] Add `.agentpress-wrap` container styles — verify: max-width 1200px defined
- [ ] Add `.agentpress-form-table` styles — verify: margin-bottom 12px, label font-weight 600
- [ ] Add `.agentpress-status-pill` styles — verify: green `#d4edda` and red `#f8d7da` colors
- [ ] Add `.agentpress-log-table` styles — verify: compact row height, zebra striping
- [ ] Add `.agentpress-section-title` styles — verify: font-size 16px, font-weight 600
- [ ] Verify no `!important` declarations — verify: `grep -i '!important' agentpress-admin.css` returns nothing
- [ ] Verify no Tailwind/Bootstrap classes — verify: `grep -E '(tw-|btn-|container)'` returns nothing
- [ ] Verify file under 100 lines — verify: `wc -l agentpress-admin.css` returns ≤ 100
- [ ] Verify file under 3KB — verify: `wc -c agentpress-admin.css` returns ≤ 3072

---

## Wave 2: Core Classes (Parallel)

### Task 4: Agents Base Class + Capability Registry

- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/class-agents.php` — verify: file exists with namespace `AgentPress`
- [ ] Implement `Agents::get_capabilities()` — verify: queries CPT, returns array of 2 capabilities
- [ ] Implement `Agents::get_capability($slug)` — verify: returns single capability or null
- [ ] Implement `Agents::build_manifest()` — verify: returns array with `slug`, `description`, `input_schema` keys
- [ ] Implement `Agents::run_internal($slug, $payload)` — verify: calls matching handler function
- [ ] Fire `agentpress_init` action hook — verify: action fires during plugin init
- [ ] Verify no `agentpress_register_capability()` function — verify: `grep -r 'function agentpress_register_capability'` returns nothing
- [ ] Test `get_capabilities()` returns both agents — verify: array contains `content_writer` and `image_generator`
- [ ] Test `build_manifest()` is JSON-serializable — verify: `json_encode()` succeeds

### Task 5: Activity Logger

- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/class-logger.php` — verify: file exists with namespace `AgentPress`
- [ ] Implement `Logger::log()` method — verify: inserts `agentpress_log` CPT post
- [ ] Store `_agentpress_capability` post_meta — verify: meta saved correctly
- [ ] Store `_agentpress_payload` post_meta — verify: meta saved as serialized array
- [ ] Store `_agentpress_result` post_meta — verify: meta saved as serialized array
- [ ] Store `_agentpress_latency_ms` post_meta — verify: meta saved as integer
- [ ] Store `_agentpress_status` post_meta — verify: meta is `success` or `error`
- [ ] Implement `Logger::prune()` — verify: deletes oldest 50 when count > 500
- [ ] Call prune on every log insertion — verify: prune called inside `log()` method
- [ ] Implement `Logger::get_recent($limit)` — verify: returns array ordered by date DESC
- [ ] Disable revisions for log CPT — verify: `wp_is_post_revision` filter returns false
- [ ] Test log insertion — verify: row appears in `wp_posts` after `log()` call
- [ ] Test auto-prune at 505 entries — verify: count stays ≤ 550 after insert

### Task 6: ContentWriter Agent

- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/agents/class-content-writer.php` — verify: file exists
- [ ] Implement `Content_Writer::run($payload)` — verify: static method accepts payload array
- [ ] Validate required `topic` field — verify: returns WP_Error if missing
- [ ] Validate `tone` enum (friendly/professional/witty) — verify: returns WP_Error for invalid
- [ ] Validate `length` enum (short/medium/long) — verify: returns WP_Error for invalid
- [ ] Build Claude prompt with topic/tone/length — verify: prompt includes all three parameters
- [ ] Call Anthropic Messages API via `wp_remote_post` — verify: endpoint `https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages`
- [ ] Set correct API headers — verify: `x-api-key`, `anthropic-version: 2023-06-01`, `Content-Type`
- [ ] Parse response with `Parser::extract_json()` — verify: uses parser class
- [ ] Validate response contains `text` — verify: returns WP_Error if missing
- [ ] Truncate output to 2048 characters — verify: `strlen(text)` ≤ 2048
- [ ] Return `tokens_used` from API response — verify: integer in response
- [ ] Register `agentpress_run_content_writer()` handler — verify: function exists
- [ ] Test with valid payload — verify: returns array with `text` and `tokens_used`
- [ ] Test with invalid tone — verify: returns WP_Error
- [ ] Test without topic — verify: returns WP_Error

### Task 7: ImageGenerator Agent

- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/agents/class-image-generator.php` — verify: file exists
- [ ] Implement `Image_Generator::run($payload)` — verify: static method accepts payload array
- [ ] Validate required `prompt` field — verify: returns WP_Error if missing
- [ ] Validate `size` enum (512x512/1024x1024) — verify: returns WP_Error for invalid
- [ ] Call CF Worker URL via `wp_remote_post` — verify: POST to configured URL
- [ ] Set timeout to 30s — verify: `'timeout' => 30` in request args
- [ ] Parse Worker response as JSON — verify: expects `url`, `format`, `size` keys
- [ ] Validate URL is HTTPS — verify: returns WP_Error for `http://` URLs
- [ ] Handle timeout gracefully — verify: returns user-friendly error message
- [ ] Return array with `url`, `format`, `size` — verify: response shape matches spec
- [ ] Register `agentpress_run_image_generator()` handler — verify: function exists
- [ ] Test with valid payload — verify: returns array with HTTPS URL
- [ ] Test with invalid size — verify: returns WP_Error
- [ ] Test timeout handling — verify: returns WP_Error, not PHP fatal

---

## Wave 3: Orchestration (Sequential)

### Task 8: Router — Keyword Map + Claude Fallback

- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/class-router.php` — verify: file exists with namespace `AgentPress`
- [ ] Define ContentWriter keyword whitelist — verify: array contains `write`, `content`, `blog`, `post`, `article`, `text`
- [ ] Define ImageGenerator keyword whitelist — verify: array contains `image`, `picture`, `photo`, `graphic`
- [ ] Implement `Router::route_local($task)` — verify: uses `stripos` for case-insensitive matching
- [ ] Implement `Router::route_claude($task, $context)` — verify: builds system prompt with manifest
- [ ] Build system prompt with capability manifest — verify: prompt instructs Claude to return ONLY JSON
- [ ] Call Claude Messages API — verify: `wp_remote_post` with 30s timeout
- [ ] Parse Claude response with `Parser::extract_json()` — verify: uses parser class
- [ ] Validate routing JSON with `Parser::validate_routing_json()` — verify: uses parser class
- [ ] Handle `capability: none` response — verify: returns WP_Error with `agentpress_no_match`
- [ ] Implement `Router::route($task, $context)` — verify: tries local first, then Claude
- [ ] Log routing decision — verify: routing info available for debugging
- [ ] Test local routing for content — verify: `route('write a blog post')` returns `source=local`
- [ ] Test local routing for images — verify: `route('generate an image')` returns `source=local`
- [ ] Test Claude fallback — verify: `route('ambiguous')` returns `source=claude`
- [ ] Test local does NOT call Claude API — verify: zero HTTP requests for local match

---

## Wave 4: Integration (Sequential)

### Task 9: REST API Endpoint

- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/class-rest-api.php` — verify: file exists with namespace `AgentPress`
- [ ] Implement `REST_API::register_routes()` — verify: hooked to `rest_api_init`
- [ ] Register `POST /agentpress/v1/run` — verify: endpoint accepts POST only
- [ ] Set `permission_callback` — verify: checks `manage_options` or `agentpress_run`
- [ ] Set `callback` to `REST_API::run_task()` — verify: callback registered
- [ ] Validate required `task` argument — verify: returns 400 if missing
- [ ] Capture `$start_time` for latency — verify: `microtime(true)` at start
- [ ] Call `Router::route()` — verify: determines capability and payload
- [ ] Handle routing WP_Error — verify: returns 500 with `agentpress_agent_error`
- [ ] Call `Agents::run_internal()` — verify: executes agent
- [ ] Handle agent WP_Error — verify: returns 500 with structured error
- [ ] Call `Logger::log()` on success — verify: logs with status `success`
- [ ] Calculate `$latency_ms` — verify: `intval((microtime(true) - $start_time) * 1000)`
- [ ] Return standardized JSON response — verify: contains `success`, `routing`, `result`, `latency_ms`
- [ ] Handle timeout with `agentpress_timeout` — verify: 500 with timeout code
- [ ] Test unauthenticated request — verify: returns 401/403
- [ ] Test missing task — verify: returns 400 `agentpress_missing_task`
- [ ] Test ContentWriter task — verify: returns 200 with `result.text`
- [ ] Test ImageGenerator task — verify: returns 200 with `result.url`
- [ ] Test error response shape — verify: contains `code`, `message`, `data`

---

## Wave 5: Admin & Polish (Parallel)

### Task 10: Admin UI

- [ ] Create `agentpress/admin/class-admin.php` — verify: file exists with namespace `AgentPress`
- [ ] Implement `Admin::add_menu()` — verify: hooked to `admin_menu`
- [ ] Register submenu under Tools — verify: slug `tools-agentpress`, capability `manage_options`
- [ ] Implement `Admin::render_page()` — verify: outputs `div.wrap` with `h1` "AgentPress"
- [ ] Render Settings section — verify: uses `settings_fields()` and `do_settings_sections()`
- [ ] Register `claude_api_key` field — verify: type="password" input
- [ ] Register `cf_worker_url` field — verify: text input with URL validation
- [ ] Register `default_model` field — verify: select dropdown with `claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022`
- [ ] Implement wp-config constant override UI — verify: field disabled with note when constant defined
- [ ] Save settings to `agentpress_settings` — verify: `register_setting()` with sanitize callback
- [ ] Render Activity Log section — verify: calls `Logger::get_recent(50)`
- [ ] Display log table with columns — verify: Time, Capability, Status, Latency
- [ ] Render status pills — verify: green for success, red for error
- [ ] Handle empty log state — verify: displays "No tasks yet" message
- [ ] Enqueue CSS only on AgentPress page — verify: `admin_enqueue_scripts` with page check
- [ ] Test menu appears under Tools — verify: navigate to Tools → AgentPress
- [ ] Test settings persist — verify: save and reload shows saved values
- [ ] Test log table displays — verify: run tasks via cURL, verify rows appear

### Task 11: Readme + Integration + Exclusion Audit

- [ ] Create `agentpress/readme.txt` — verify: file exists
- [ ] Add WP.org header — verify: `=== AgentPress ===`, contributors, tags, requires at least 6.0
- [ ] Write 3-paragraph description — verify: what, how, built-in agents
- [ ] Write Installation section — verify: upload, activate, enter API key
- [ ] Add API Example with cURL — verify: POST command with `--user` auth
- [ ] Add Anthropic ToS disclosure — verify: mentions API key requirement
- [ ] Create `agentpress/includes/agents/class-agent-third.php` stub — verify: minimal file with comment
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for SEOMeta — verify: `grep -r 'seo_meta' agentpress/` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for manual runner — verify: `grep -r 'task.*runner'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for registration API — verify: `grep -r 'agentpress_register_capability'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for streaming — verify: `grep -r 'stream'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for async — verify: `grep -r 'async\|queue\|wp_cron.*task'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for BYOK — verify: `grep -r 'user.*api.*key'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for chat widget — verify: `grep -r 'chat_widget\|shortcode'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for wizard — verify: `grep -r 'wizard\|onboarding\|tour'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run exclusion audit for encryption — verify: `grep -r 'base64_encode\|openssl_encrypt'` returns nothing
- [ ] Run smoke test — verify: activate plugin, run both agent tasks, verify logs appear
- [ ] Verify plugin size — verify: `du -sh agentpress/` returns < 500K

---

## Test Scripts

- [ ] Create `tests/verify-structure.sh` — verify: script exists and is executable
- [ ] Create `tests/verify-no-banned-patterns.sh` — verify: script exists and is executable
- [ ] Create `tests/verify-file-existence.sh` — verify: script exists and is executable
- [ ] Create `tests/run-all-tests.sh` — verify: script exists and is executable
- [ ] Run all test scripts — verify: all exit 0

---

## Notes

- Each task should complete in <5 minutes
- Each task has a verification step (how to check it worked)
- Tasks ordered by dependency (earlier waves must complete before later waves)
- Wave 1, 2, and 5 tasks can run in parallel within their wave
- Wave 3 and 4 are sequential (router depends on agents, REST depends on router)
